## Permissions

- May create a feature branch and draft pull request.
- May update this issue with progress or blockers.
- Must not merge.
- Must not modify any Obsidian vault or central planning source.

## Stop conditions

Stop and mark the issue `[agent-blocked]` when a product decision, missing credential, sensitive external context, cross-project change, or scope expansion is required.
